defaultRule.claimLanguage: Component-level browser API diagnostic only; not a direct L0 parity claim.
defaultRule.projectionNote: Default browser API projection with declared browser-layer overhead.

upload.claimLanguage: Strict browser API candidate only when timing scope and semantics are explicitly matched.
upload.projectionNote: Direct queue.writeBuffer mapping with per-op normalization.

compute.claimLanguage: Strict browser API candidate only when timing scope and semantics are explicitly matched.
compute.projectionNote: Direct compute dispatch projection with minimal browser mediation.

pipeline.claimLanguage: Component-level pipeline behavior only; no L0 parity claim language.
pipeline.projectionNote: Pipeline creation remains comparable but includes browser-side scheduling overhead.

render.claimLanguage: Component-level render behavior only; no L0 parity claim language.
render.projectionNote: Render command shape projects to browser API with canvas/context overhead.

render-bundle.claimLanguage: Component-level render-bundle behavior only; no L0 parity claim language.
render-bundle.projectionNote: Render bundle throughput projected with browser submission overhead.

texture-raster.claimLanguage: Component-level texture raster behavior only; no L0 parity claim language.
texture-raster.projectionNote: Texture sampling+raster projection includes browser canvas integration costs.

texture-contract.claimLanguage: Strict browser API candidate only when timing scope and semantics are explicitly matched.
texture-contract.projectionNote: Texture write/query/destroy semantics map directly to browser WebGPU APIs.

pipeline-async.claimLanguage: Component-level async pipeline behavior only; no L0 parity claim language.
pipeline-async.projectionNote: Async pipeline APIs are comparable but sensitive to browser event-loop scheduling.

render-macro.claimLanguage: Component-level macro render behavior only; no L0 parity claim language.
render-macro.projectionNote: Macro render loops are projected as component-level browser runs.

texture-macro.claimLanguage: Component-level macro texture behavior only; no L0 parity claim language.
texture-macro.projectionNote: Texture macro loops project to browser API with non-trivial event-loop overhead.

surface.claimLanguage: Component-level presentation behavior only; no L0 parity claim language.
surface.projectionNote: Surface presentation can be measured in browser, but includes presentation stack overhead.

p0-resource.claimLanguage: L0-only runtime contract row; no browser-layer claim language is allowed.
p0-resource.projectionNote: Runtime contract lane; keep in core engine benchmarks only.

p0-compute.claimLanguage: L0-only runtime contract row; no browser-layer claim language is allowed.
p0-compute.projectionNote: Runtime contract lane; keep in core engine benchmarks only.

p0-render.claimLanguage: L0-only runtime contract row; no browser-layer claim language is allowed.
p0-render.projectionNote: Runtime contract lane; keep in core engine benchmarks only.

p0-render-macro.claimLanguage: L0-only runtime contract row; no browser-layer claim language is allowed.
p0-render-macro.projectionNote: Runtime contract macro lane; keep in core engine benchmarks only.

p1-capability.claimLanguage: L0-only runtime contract row; no browser-layer claim language is allowed.
p1-capability.projectionNote: Internal capability contract lane; not a browser API parity signal.

p1-resource-table.claimLanguage: L0-only runtime contract row; no browser-layer claim language is allowed.
p1-resource-table.projectionNote: Internal resource-table contract lane; keep in core engine benchmarks only.

p2-lifecycle.claimLanguage: L0-only runtime contract row; no browser-layer claim language is allowed.
p2-lifecycle.projectionNote: Internal lifecycle/refcount contract lane; keep in core engine benchmarks only.

p1-capability-macro.claimLanguage: L0-only runtime contract row; no browser-layer claim language is allowed.
p1-capability-macro.projectionNote: Internal capability macro lane; keep in core engine benchmarks only.

p1-resource-table-macro.claimLanguage: L0-only runtime contract row; no browser-layer claim language is allowed.
p1-resource-table-macro.projectionNote: Internal resource-table macro lane; keep in core engine benchmarks only.

p2-lifecycle-macro.claimLanguage: L0-only runtime contract row; no browser-layer claim language is allowed.
p2-lifecycle-macro.projectionNote: Internal lifecycle macro lane; keep in core engine benchmarks only.
